items.title: Marine Le Pen to run for French presidency and appeal conviction in top court
items.dek: The hard-right National Rally leader has ended months of speculation, after a court ruled she could run but would have to wear a tag for a year.
items.body: The hard-right National Rally leader has ended months of speculation, after a court ruled she could run but would have to wear a tag for a year.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump looms large as Nato grapples with challenge of rearming Europe
items.dek: The US president's inflammatory words have punctuated the image of unity at this crucial gathering, Security Correspondent Frank Gardner writes.
items.body: The US president's inflammatory words have punctuated the image of unity at this crucial gathering, Security Correspondent Frank Gardner writes.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hungary's public news broadcasts halted in bid to scrap Orban-era propaganda
items.dek: The country's main state TV channel displayed a message saying it was "sorry" for lying on Tuesday.
items.body: The country's main state TV channel displayed a message saying it was "sorry" for lying on Tuesday.
items.author: IriLine Desk
